## Description

What does this PR do? What problem does it solve?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New MDM provider
- [ ] New identity provider
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] Other

## How has this been tested?

Describe how you tested your changes. If adding a new MDM or IdP provider, describe the environment you tested against.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style and patterns in the codebase
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, docs/, .env.example)
- [ ] I have tested my changes against a real or sandbox environment
- [ ] If adding a new MDM provider: `BaseMDMService` interface is fully implemented
- [ ] If adding a new IdP provider: `docs/identity-providers.md` is updated
- [ ] New env vars are documented in `backend/.env.example`
- [ ] `README.md` integration table is updated if applicable
